name: Easy Beef Tips in Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef tip round, cut into bite-sized pieces
2 cans cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
1 can mushroom stems and pieces, drained
12 ounces egg noodles, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the meat in a small roaster pan.
2. Pour the onion soup mix over the meat.
3. Add the mushroom soup, followed by the soda mixed with wine and mushrooms.
4. Cover the pan and place it in the oven.
5. Bake for 2 hours at 375°F.
6. Serve the beef tips over noodles.
